name: Cala en Porter
description: A cove set between high cliffs, with fine sand and calm water, beside a resort with full amenities. Renowned for Cova d'en Xoroi, a clifftop bar, viewpoint and club carved into the rock. Easy to reach by car, though more built-up than the wilder coves.

highlights: swim in a cove of fine sand set between high cliffs
go up to the Cova d'en Xoroi, in the cliff, for a sunset drink
park up in the resort above and walk down to the beach by the steps
